subject: docs(session): handoff note for next session to apply scheduling migration
body:
Feature code complete on this branch. Remote DB migration not yet applied.
Next session has SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN + SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD env vars and
pg_cron enabled, so supabase db push + smoke test can run unattended.

Tags: docs, session-handoff
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: message-scheduling
Semver: patch
title: handoff note for next session to apply scheduling migration
